title: Purchasing Officer (Supply Chain)
description:
Job Description:

  • Obtain and review vendor-quoted item datasheets to support part number creation, under the guidance of the manager or superior.
  • Set up or maintain vendor records in the ERP system (NetSuite) following approval from the manager or superior.
  • Prepare, issue, and track purchase requisitions and purchase orders, ensuring all purchasing information is accurate and complete.
  • Follow up with vendors on purchase order acknowledgements and update records accordingly.
  • Proactively chase outstanding orders with vendors and update delivery timelines in the ERP system (NetSuite) to support project schedules.
  • Assist with monthly inventory stock counts in collaboration with the warehouse and logistics teams to ensure inventory accuracy.
  • Review and validate invoices to ensure correctness of amounts, payment terms, and milestone billing prior to processing.
  • Verify vendor sales notes against issued purchase orders and escalate any discrepancies to the manager or superior before forwarding to the requestor within five working days.
  • Build and maintain effective working relationships with suppliers and vendors to support ongoing procurement operations.
  • Work closely with warehouse and logistics teams to facilitate cross-functional supply chain activities and ensure end-to-end process coordination.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Supply Chain Management, Business, Logistics or any related fields.
  • Minimum 2 years of working experience as Procurement role.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.
